scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'])fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});if(!/^pnpm\//.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'')){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy artifacts/pool-reservation/dist/public --project-name pool-reservation
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
